bosses.name: Khargul, Flame of the Deep
introLog: Chains older than the city shift and snap.

abilities.name: Flame Lash
abilities.description: Khargul's whip uncoils in a slow arc of fire — 160% damage that sets the wound alight.

effects.spawnText: Khargul drags the old wards out of the walls — three Seals ignite across the chamber.

effects.name: Rising Heat
effects.spokenText: The deep grows hotter. The very air will cook you alive.

effects.name: Rising Heat
effects.spokenText: The deep grows hotter. The very air will cook you alive.

effects.name: Rising Heat
effects.spokenText: The deep grows hotter. The very air will cook you alive.

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Fire Sweep!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: Flames sweep across two rows — get clear.

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Dive Slash!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: A diagonal fire strike cuts across the arena.

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Scatter Flames!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: Fire rains down on random tiles.

abilities.name: Graveguard Riposte
abilities.description: Training copy. After blocking an attack, answers with a harmless riposte.

abilities.name: Lance of Contrition
abilities.description: Training copy. A low-damage version of the heavy thrust.
abilities.castStartText: Fallen Knight lowers his spear for Lance of Contrition...

abilities.name: Oathguard
abilities.description: Training copy. Raises his shield to fully block the next incoming auto attack, then counters for minimal damage.

abilities.name: Kneel to the Oath
abilities.description: Training copy. Staggers the player without meaningful damage.

abilities.name: Executioner's Thrust
abilities.description: Training copy. Below 35% health, commits to a harmless execution thrust.

effects.name: Oath Pillars
effects.phaseOutText: Training Fallen Knight vanishes into the oath. Four harmless pillars answer in his place.
effects.returnText: The last training pillar breaks. Fallen Knight steps back through the oath.

abilities.name: Wyvern Breath
abilities.description: A 3 second channel that breathes fire every second. Stunning the wyvern interrupts the channel.

abilities.name: Tail Swing
abilities.description: The wyvern winds up and sweeps its tail, dealing heavy damage and stunning on hit.

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Fire Breath!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: The wyvern rears back and sweeps the rooftop with flames.

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Tail Swing!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: The wyvern sweeps its massive tail in a wide arc. Move left or right out of its path!

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Aerial Dive!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: The wyvern launches into the air and plunges across the parapet.

dodgePhaseConfig.title: Flame Barrage!
dodgePhaseConfig.description: A frenzied barrage of fire rains down from above.

phases.label: Airborne - The wyvern spreads its wings and launches from the parapet. The sky fills with smoke.

abilities.name: Graveguard Riposte
abilities.description: After blocking an attack, the Fallen Knight answers with a shield-counter that pierces armor and staggers the player.

abilities.name: Lance of Contrition
abilities.description: A heavy two-second thrust that deals 155% weapon damage with high armor penetration.
abilities.castStartText: Fallen Knight lowers his spear for Lance of Contrition...

abilities.name: Oathguard
abilities.description: Raises his shield to fully block the next incoming auto attack, then counters.

abilities.name: Kneel to the Oath
abilities.description: A command that staggers the player for the next two auto attacks.

abilities.name: Executioner's Thrust
abilities.description: Below 35% health, the Fallen Knight commits to a lethal thrust for 185% weapon damage.

effects.name: Oath Pillars
effects.phaseOutText: Fallen Knight vanishes into the oath. Four pillars answer in his place.
effects.returnText: The last pillar breaks. Fallen Knight steps back through the oath.

abilities.name: Poison Spit
abilities.description: Launches a venom glob that deals poison damage and applies Brood Venom.

abilities.name: Web Snare
abilities.description: Freezes the player's auto-attack for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Brood Call
abilities.description: Summons 2 Cave Spiderlings from the nest.

phase2Abilities.name: Poison Spit
phase2Abilities.description: Stronger venom spray that builds Brood Venom stacks faster.

phase2Abilities.name: Web Snare
phase2Abilities.description: Freezes the player's auto-attack for 2 seconds.

phase2Abilities.name: Brood Call
phase2Abilities.description: Summons 3 Spiderlings. After 8 seconds, surviving ones are devoured to heal the Broodmother.

abilities.name: Web Snare
abilities.description: Freezes the player's auto-attack for 2 seconds.

phase2Abilities.name: Web Snare
phase2Abilities.description: Freezes the player's auto-attack for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Hammer Slam
abilities.description: A thunderous ancestral hammer blow for 130% damage that stuns briefly.

abilities.name: Iron Bulwark
abilities.description: Raises the ancestral shield — block chance surges for the next 4 incoming hits.

abilities.name: Ancestral Roar
abilities.description: A soul-shaking roar from the ancient bloodline — weakens and staggers the hero.

abilities.name: Loose the Beast
abilities.description: At half health, Durnek breaks the chains — Kharvox enters the fight.

abilities.name: Ancestral Wrath
abilities.description: Phase 2: A furious overhead smash for 180% damage with bonus critical chance.
